title: 제 인생 국밥 1등 맛집입니다🤫 장암동 우리나라 국밥 먹방
제 인생 국밥 1등 맛집입니다🤫 장암동 우리나라 국밥 먹방
description:
Hello, Subscribers from all over the World! 
This is Tzuyang.

I apologize for the latest videos. 😥

As of last Thursday,
There has been an issue with the subtitles, 
and we are working to resolve it immediately.

Going forward, 
I will do my best not to be late so that my followers can view my videos with the appropriate subtitles as soon as possible.

Thanks a lot for watching my videos.
Thank you so much for all your support.😍


각국어 번역 자막 제작 :
